revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Magma Ocean Planet | Guid=3035-8157 | Deck=The '''Magma Ocean Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Sisyphus is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Magma Ocean Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Sisyphus is fought.

{{Location | Name=Magmam City | Guid=3035-8419 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Town in the game Sword of Vermilion

{{Location | Name=Malawi | Guid=3035-7997 | Deck=Malawi is a republic in Southeastern Africa. Its capital city is Lilongwe. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Malawi is a republic in Southeastern Africa. Its capital city is Lilongwe.

{{Location | Name=Manhattan | Guid=3035-8222 | Deck=A city in Kansas and the home of Kansas State University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Kansas_State_Wildcats | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Kansas,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614353-8063978100-Riley.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Manitoba | Guid=3035-8313 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Maple Valley Raceway | Guid=3035-8123 | Deck=One of the very first fictional tracks of the Forza Motorsport franchise, Maple Valley Raceway could be considered as Turn 10's response to Gran Turismo's Autumn Ring, with its fall landscape and its cross-over. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/1/14876/3515465-8541813515-5f05e1.jpeg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3515465-8541813515-5f05e1.jpeg","path":"1\/14876\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> One of the very first fictional tracks of the Forza Motorsport franchise, Maple Valley Raceway could be considered as Turn 10's response to Gran Turismo's Autumn Ring, with its fall landscape and its cross-over.

{{Location | Name=Mata-Nui | Guid=3035-7952 | Deck=Mata-Nui was a large island that was a major setting in Bionicle. Below it is the city of Metru-Nui which mirrors it's surface counterpart. | Characters=Characters/Takanuva | Concepts=Concepts/Bohrok,Concepts/Rahkshi | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/Cave,Locations/Desert,Locations/Island,Locations/Jungle,Locations/Tundra,Locations/Volcanic_Terrain,Locations/Volcano | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3442208-7447548711-CGI_M.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3442208-7447548711-CGI_M.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_tiny,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Mata-Nui was a large island that was a major setting in Bionicle. Below it is the city of Metru-Nui which mirrors it's surface counterpart.

{{Location | Name=Mauritania | Guid=3035-7998 | Deck=Mauritania is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Nouakchott. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Mauritania is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Nouakchott.

{{Location | Name=Mauritius | Guid=3035-7999 | Deck=Mauritius is an island republic in the Southern Indian Ocean. Its capital city is Port Louis. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/McDonalds }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Mauritius is an island republic in the Southern Indian Ocean. Its capital city is Port Louis.

{{Location | Name=McDonald's | Guid=3035-8115 | Deck=McDonald's is a very popular American fast food chain that has served over a billion burgers worldwide. | Characters=Characters/Abby_Mallard,Characters/Alvin_Seville,Characters/Ariel_12406,Characters/Ash_Ketchum,Characters/Babs_Bunny,Characters/Batman,Characters/Birdie_15897,Characters/Bo_Peep,Characters/Bob_41745,Characters/Brother_Bear,Characters/Bugs_Bunny,Characters/Buster_Bunny,Characters/Buzz_Lightyear,Characters/Char_Aznable,Characters/Charlie_Brown,Characters/Chicken_Little,Characters/Chip_16730,Characters/Daffy_Duck,Characters/Dale,Characters/Daphne_Blake,Characters/Dash_Parr,Characters/Dick_Grayson,Characters/Dodger,Characters/Donkey,Characters/Dory,Characters/Dot_Warner,Characters/Ducky,Characters/Dukey,Characters/Elmer_Fudd,Characters/Elmyra_Duff,Characters/Emmet,Characters/Eric_Cartman,Characters/Flik_7441,Characters/Flounder,Characters/Fozzie_Bear,Characters/Fred_Jones,Characters/Garfield,Characters/Gingerbread_Man_7744,Characters/Ginormica,Characters/Gonzo_the_Great,Characters/Goofy,Characters/Grimace,Characters/Gru,Characters/Grug_Crood,Characters/Guy_31933,Characters/Hamburglar,Characters/Hamton_J_Pig,Characters/Heimlich,Characters/Hiccup_Haddock,Characters/Humungousaur,Characters/Jack_Jack_Parr,Characters/James_Gordon,Characters/Jaq,Characters/Johnny_Test,Characters/Kermit_the_Frog,Characters/Kim_Possible,Characters/Lucy_Van_Pelt,Characters/Mario,Characters/Marlin,Characters/Mary_Test,Characters/Megamind,Characters/Meowth,Characters/Mickey_Mouse,Characters/Mike_Wazowski,Characters/Minion_26137,Characters/Minnie_Mouse,Characters/Miss_Piggy,Characters/Mr_Incredible,Characters/Mr_Peabody,Characters/Mr_Potato_Head,Characters/Mrs_Incredible,Characters/Mushu,Characters/Nemo_7442,Characters/Papa_Bear_45878,Characters/Papa_Smurf,Characters/Parappa,Characters/Patrick_Star,Characters/Pepe_Le_Pew,Characters/Peter_Parker,Characters/Pikachu,Characters/Plankton,Characters/Plucky_Duck,Characters/Pluto,Characters/Po,Characters/Porky_Pig,Characters/Puss_in_Boots,Characters/Ralph_23754,Characters/Rex_25359,Characters/Rich_Uncle_Pennybags,Characters/Ron_Stoppable,Charact revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Monument Valley | Guid=3035-8025 | Deck=A geologic formation of a series of red sandstone cliffs along the Arizona-Utah border in the United States. A famous tourist view often depicted in popular culture. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Native_American,Concepts/Off_Road_Racing,Concepts/Pop_Culture_Reference,Concepts/Vulture | Objects=Objects/Boulder,Objects/Rock,Objects/Tumbleweed | Locations=Locations/Arizona,Locations/Canyon,Locations/Desert,Locations/Mountains,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Utah,Locations/Wild_West | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3628295-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B001.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3628295-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u043001.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,scale_super,scale_small,scale_tiny,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Monument Valley"},"background":[]}' /> A popular backdrop in racing games, western action games and 2D platformers, which often have a Wild West-themed level.

{{Location | Name=Moonlight Bay | Guid=3035-7974 | Deck=Moonlight Bay is a coastal town in the console version of The Sims 3. | Characters=Characters/Tyler_Strong | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3447161-moonlight_bay.png}}

{{Location | Name=Neomuna | Guid=3035-7972 | Deck=Neomuna is a destination in Lightfall. It is a Human city on Neptune that developed in secret during or shortly after the Collapse.
It is defended by warriors known as Cloud Striders, who have voluntarily undergone cybernetic augmentation at the cost of significantly reducing their lifespan. | Characters=Characters/Emperor_Calus,Characters/Nimbus,Characters/Osiris_37711 | Concepts=Concepts/Cabal_9935,Concepts/Human,Concepts/MacGuffin,Concepts/Psion,Concepts/Vex | Objects= | Locations=Locations/City,Locations/Cyberspace,Locations/Neptune | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3454111-7252229639-Neomu.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3454111-7252229639-Neomu.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Neomuna is a destination in Lightfall. It is a Human city on Neptune that developed in secret during or shortly after the Collapse.
It is defended by warriors known as Cloud Striders, who have voluntarily undergone cybernetic augmentation at the cost of significantly reducing their lifespan.

{{Location | Name=Netherlands Antilles | Guid=3035-8000 | Deck=The Netherlands Antilles was, until 10 October 2010, an island territory in the Caribbean Sea, associated to the Netherlands. Its capital city was called Willemstad. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The Netherlands Antilles was, until 10 October 2010, an island territory in the Caribbean Sea, associated to the Netherlands. Its capital city was called Willemstad.
